name: Dr. McMourning
title: Malpractitioner

abilities.name: Catalyst
abilities.text: When an enemy model with a friendly Poison token activates within 3", deal 1 damage to it.

abilities.name: Organ Donor
abilities.text: After this model damages an enemy model with a friendly Poison token with a (melee) action, this model heals 2.

abilities.name: Precise
abilities.text: This model's (melee) actions ignore (warding) abilities and Shielded tokens.

actions.name: Scalpel
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: "Off the Table! This is Surgery!"
triggers.text: Summon a Zombie Chihuahua in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Severed Hand Prank
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token and this model may move it up to 3".

triggers.name: "Found the Tumor"
triggers.text: Summon a Little Gasser in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Vial of Goo
actions.effects: The target gains a Poison token.

triggers.name: "Oh, That's What Was In There"
triggers.text: This model declares the Cobble Together action.

actions.name: Cobble Together
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove at least one and up to three friendly Poison tokens from enemy models within range.
actions.effects: Summon an ally within range with health equal to twice the number of Poison tokens removed.

triggers.name: Creative Genius
triggers.text: The summoned model gains an Interesting Parts token.

extraction_notes: Keywords shown at bottom are 'Mortuary Access' on left and 'Zombie Chihuahua' on right, separated by position rather than text divider
